segments.text: Coming back, forward smash off up tilt looks to catch, but...
segments.original_text: 復帰通して上強で拾われる横スマが見えたが
上必殺でしっかり逃げて

segments.text: The whiff punish on forward smash doesn't work out
segments.original_text: 横スマ振っての差し返しは実らず

segments.text: Gets caught by nair trading with the spin's invincibility frames
segments.original_text: スピンの無敵合わせ空Nに打たれる

full_text: Coming back, forward smash off up tilt looks to catch, but... Cleanly escapes with up B The whiff punish on forward smash doesn't work out Gets caught by nair trading with the spin's invincibility frames Barely...

corrections.original: 横スマ足での差し返し
corrections.corrected: 横スマ振っての差し返し

corrections.original: スピンの無敵合わせ空中に打たれる
corrections.corrected: スピンの無敵合わせ空Nに打たれる
